items.name_en: Full steel hardware 👻 Top-tier replica 😻 Changed code chip 💯 Model: M12106 Pink Small Double-sided Shopping Bag ❣️❣️ Neverfull Bandoulière Inside Out BB Handbag, this season's interpretation of the classic double-sided design, featuring the iconic Monogram canvas and grained leather on the front and back. The detachable zip pouch can be used alone or hung externally. The detachable shoulder strap makes crossbody carrying convenient, while dazzling metal hardware adds refined details.

items.name_en: Model: M83480 Bucket Bag 💋💋 [Top-tier Original Batch Dynamic New Chip] Canoé Handbag. Crafted from Monogram canvas, it combines the Noé and Cannes handbags, merging the former's drawstring with the latter's molded bottom design for a trendy look and practical function. The woven chain and leather shoulder strap are detachable for multiple carrying styles. Monogram coated canvas - calfskin trim - microfiber lining - metal hardware - drawstring closure - fits smartphone, keys, compact wallet, headphones - Shoulder strap: detachable, adjustable!!; Dimensions: 14x20.5x14CM
items.name_cn: Model: M83480 Bucket Bag 💋💋 [Top-tier Original Batch Dynamic New Chip] Canoé Handbag. Crafted from Monogram canvas, it combines the Noé and Cannes handbags, merging the former's drawstring with the latter's molded bottom design for a trendy look and practical function. The Twist lock adds a striking touch, while the top handle can be carried alone or converted into a leather shoulder pad with a sliding chain strap for a comfortable shoulder or crossbody experience.
Dimensions: 23 x 16 x 10cm
